calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jimmy Fu in Propria Persona.
Jiahui Ke in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that these petitions are appropriate when a marriage was not registered or certified copies of a marriage certificate can not be obtained, and noted that a certified copy of the record of marriage was attached to the petition. Mr. Fu stated that foreign marriage certificates are not recognized in California, that they are planning to adjust property titles and that he has not had any trouble from anyone at this point. The Court stated that this does not fit under the statute. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
